notes: Iron Cooking Station is now a proper superset. Filter to Iron with Craft Mats on and you'll see all 14 raw meats — Boar, Neck, Deer, Raw Fish, Chicken, Wolf, Bear, Lox, Serpent, Seeker, Hare, Bonemaw, Asksvin, Volture — because anything grilled on the basic rack also cooks on the iron one. Item list at the Iron station detail view expands the same way.
